---
name: finish
description: Remove bootstrap scaffolding after the generate pipeline is complete. Deletes discovery state, pipeline machinery, and bootstrap-only agents/skills/prompts. Leaves only project-specific artifacts.
tools: ['read', 'runInTerminal']
---

Remove bootstrap scaffolding from this project, leaving only the generated project-specific configuration.

## Pre-flight

1. Read `project.json`. If it doesn't exist, stop: "project.json not found. Nothing to clean up."
2. Verify `.github/agents/project.agent.md` exists. If not, stop: "Project agent not found. Run `/generate` first to complete the pipeline before finishing."
3. Verify `.github/copilot-instructions.md` exists. If not, stop: "copilot-instructions.md not found. Run `/generate` first."
4. Verify `.github/skills/` contains at least one project-specific skill (one that is NOT in the bootstrap skill list below). If not, stop: "No project skills found. Run `/generate` first."

## What will be removed

**Bootstrap state directories:**
- `.discovery/` — scan and pipeline state (context.json, pipeline.lock.json, generate.lock.json)
- `.project/` — workflow and answers state (state/workflow.json, state/answers.json)

**Bootstrap metadata:**
- `project.json`
- `MANUAL.md`

**Bootstrap workflow docs:**
- `docs/workflow/` — bootstrap-only workflow documentation

**Bootstrap scripts:**
- `scripts/` — init.sh, next.sh, step.sh, ask.sh

**Bootstrap agents** (all agents except `project.agent.md`):
- `.github/agents/bootstrap.agent.md`
- `.github/agents/analyst.agent.md`
- `.github/agents/architect.agent.md`
- `.github/agents/designer.agent.md`
- `.github/agents/spec.agent.md`
- `.github/agents/script.agent.md`
- `.github/agents/evaluator.agent.md`
- `.github/agents/ops.agent.md`
- `.github/agents/discovery.agent.md`

**Bootstrap pipeline skills** (`.github/skills/` subdirectories):
`bootstrap-ask`, `bootstrap-next`, `workflow-read`, `workflow-update`,
`scan-codebase`, `discover-candidates`, `analyze-candidates`, `verify-coverage`,
`lock-l1`, `define-l2`, `generate-discovery-domain`, `compare-blueprint`,
`run-discovery-pipeline`, `generate-prd`, `generate-capabilities`, `generate-kpis`,
`generate-human-agent-map`, `generate-domain`, `generate-rbac`, `generate-workflows`,
`generate-agent-pattern`, `generate-cost-model`, `generate-design-workflow`, `generate-ia`,
`generate-flows`, `generate-spec`, `generate-eval-framework`, `generate-pov-plan`,
`generate-skills`, `generate-scripts`, `generate-monitoring-spec`, `generate-governance`,
`generate-copilot-instructions`, `generate-brownfield-skills`, `generate-brownfield-prompts`,
`generate-brownfield-hooks`, `generate-stitch-screens`, `generate-wireframes`,
`generate-project-agent`, `run-generate-pipeline`, `run-spec-pipeline`

**Bootstrap prompts** (`.github/prompts/` files):
`init.prompt.md`, `bootstrap.prompt.md`, `scan.prompt.md`, `discover.prompt.md`,
`generate.prompt.md`, `finish.prompt.md`, `reset.prompt.md`, `stitch.prompt.md`,
`pov.prompt.md`, `adlc-status.prompt.md`, `review-spec.prompt.md`,
`review-agent.prompt.md`, `discovery-status.prompt.md`, `status.prompt.md`,
`spec.prompt.md`, `build-context.prompt.md`

## What will be kept

- `.github/agents/project.agent.md` — project development agent
- `.github/copilot-instructions.md` — project-wide conventions
- `.github/skills/` — project-specific skills generated by the pipeline
- `.github/prompts/` — project-specific prompts generated by the pipeline
- `.vscode/settings.json` — workspace settings
- `docs/analysis/` — PRD, capabilities, KPIs
- `docs/discovery/` — capability map, domain model, blueprint comparison
- `docs/domain/` — domain model, RBAC, workflows
- `docs/design/` — IA, flows, screens
- `docs/spec/` — API, events, permissions, state machines
- `docs/ops/` — monitoring, governance

## Confirmation

Tell the user:

```
Ready to remove bootstrap scaffolding.

Will DELETE:
  - .discovery/          (pipeline state)
  - .project/            (workflow state)
  - project.json
  - MANUAL.md
  - docs/workflow/
  - scripts/
  - .github/agents/      (all bootstrap agents — keeping project.agent.md)
  - .github/skills/      ({N} bootstrap skills)
  - .github/prompts/     ({N} bootstrap prompts)

Will KEEP:
  - .github/agents/project.agent.md
  - .github/copilot-instructions.md
  - .github/skills/      ({N} project skills)
  - .github/prompts/     ({N} project prompts)
  - .vscode/settings.json
  - docs/                (all generated project documentation)

Type "yes" to proceed.
```

Wait for the user to confirm with "yes" before executing any deletions.

## Execution

Run these terminal commands in sequence. After each, verify it succeeded before continuing.

```bash
# Bootstrap state
rm -rf .discovery/
rm -rf .project/

# Bootstrap metadata
rm -f project.json
rm -f MANUAL.md

# Bootstrap workflow docs
rm -rf docs/workflow/

# Bootstrap scripts
rm -rf scripts/

# Bootstrap agents (keep project.agent.md)
rm -f .github/agents/bootstrap.agent.md
rm -f .github/agents/analyst.agent.md
rm -f .github/agents/architect.agent.md
rm -f .github/agents/designer.agent.md
rm -f .github/agents/spec.agent.md
rm -f .github/agents/script.agent.md
rm -f .github/agents/evaluator.agent.md
rm -f .github/agents/ops.agent.md
rm -f .github/agents/discovery.agent.md

# Bootstrap pipeline skills
rm -rf .github/skills/bootstrap-ask/
rm -rf .github/skills/bootstrap-next/
rm -rf .github/skills/workflow-read/
rm -rf .github/skills/workflow-update/
rm -rf .github/skills/scan-codebase/
rm -rf .github/skills/discover-candidates/
rm -rf .github/skills/analyze-candidates/
rm -rf .github/skills/verify-coverage/
rm -rf .github/skills/lock-l1/
rm -rf .github/skills/define-l2/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-discovery-domain/
rm -rf .github/skills/compare-blueprint/
rm -rf .github/skills/run-discovery-pipeline/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-prd/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-capabilities/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-kpis/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-human-agent-map/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-domain/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-rbac/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-workflows/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-agent-pattern/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-cost-model/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-design-workflow/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-ia/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-flows/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-spec/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-eval-framework/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-pov-plan/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-skills/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-scripts/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-monitoring-spec/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-governance/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-copilot-instructions/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-brownfield-skills/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-brownfield-prompts/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-brownfield-hooks/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-stitch-screens/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-wireframes/
rm -rf .github/skills/generate-project-agent/
rm -rf .github/skills/run-generate-pipeline/
rm -rf .github/skills/run-spec-pipeline/

# Bootstrap prompts
rm -f .github/prompts/init.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/bootstrap.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/scan.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/discover.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/generate.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/finish.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/reset.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/stitch.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/pov.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/adlc-status.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/review-spec.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/review-agent.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/discovery-status.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/status.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/spec.prompt.md
rm -f .github/prompts/build-context.prompt.md
```

## After completion

Print:

```
Bootstrap scaffolding removed.

Kept:
  ✔ .github/agents/project.agent.md
  ✔ .github/copilot-instructions.md
  ✔ .github/skills/   ({N} project skills)
  ✔ .github/prompts/  ({N} project prompts)
  ✔ docs/             (all generated project documentation)

Select the {project name} agent in Copilot Chat to start developing.
```
